title: [CS] Money
description: Adds in Dollars for ingame Economies or Roleplaying.
body:
# [CS] Money

## [Current Features]

- USD
- Coins such as Quarters
- Singular Peso Item
- Money Piles
 
### [Our thought process]

We made this mode because we decided that we needed money that resembled real life currencies.
Since all the coin mods werent really working for our purposes. So we created this, with the future intention of adding in more.

 

We will add onto this mod as we improve our skill, such as adding wallets or other content such as safes.

 

If you have something to suggest feel free to tell us in our Discord Server <3

https://discord.gg/adnGN3ZnJ2
